vehicle.label: 6-DOF Industrial Arm
vehicle.desc: 6-DOF serial industrial robot arm, 5kg payload, 600mm reach

parts.label: Base Joint (J1)
parts.spec: Base rotary joint J1, +-180deg, harmonic drive, 100Nm peak torque, mounting flange ISO 9409

parts.label: Shoulder Joint (J2)
parts.spec: Shoulder pitch joint J2, +-120deg, harmonic drive, 80Nm, cable routing through center bore

parts.label: Upper Arm (Link 2-3)
parts.spec: Upper arm link, 300mm length, hollow tube with cable conduit, lightweight Al 7075

parts.label: Elbow Joint (J3)
parts.spec: Elbow pitch joint J3, +-150deg, cycloidal reducer, 50Nm, encoder dual-stack

parts.label: Forearm + Wrist (J4)
parts.spec: Forearm with wrist roll J4, 250mm length, +-360deg continuous, slip ring for power/signal

parts.label: Wrist Pitch (J5)
parts.spec: Wrist pitch joint J5, +-120deg, harmonic drive, 20Nm, compact form factor

parts.label: Wrist Roll (J6)
parts.spec: Wrist final roll joint J6, +-360deg, harmonic drive, 10Nm, ISO 9409-1 50mm tool flange

parts.label: Tool Flange + Changer
parts.spec: Tool changer master plate at J6 end, pneumatic locking, 4 utility ports

parts.label: Cable Management Spine
parts.spec: External cable carrier from base to wrist, drag chain or spiral, signal + power + pneumatic

parts.label: Replaceable Motor Module Set
parts.spec: Actuation_motors closure module: replaceable motor_module cartridges for J1-J6, fastener_access, coupling_dummy, insert/washer preload pads, torque_Nm intent labels

parts.label: Encoder Cover + Sensing Set
parts.spec: Sensing_encoders closure module: encoder_pocket and encoder_cover at each joint, index marks, cable exit strain relief, inspection labels

parts.label: Drive Electronics Bay
parts.spec: Drive_electronics bay with driver_bay, power_channel, signal_channel, ground_point, service cover, connector keying, thermal inspection window

requirements: Base rotary joint J1, +-180deg, harmonic drive, 100Nm peak torque, mounting flange ISO 9409
Cleanroom compatible, ESD-safe, particle-free joint seals
Mounting flange ISO 9409
Cable entry grommet for harness passthrough
Leveling screws for precise alignment

risk.desc: The mass budget is higher than expected, which may impact the overall robot arm weight
risk.mit: Review the design for potential weight reduction opportunities

risk.desc: The harmonic drive may experience thermal expansion due to high torque, affecting alignment
risk.mit: Implement thermal management solutions to mitigate expansion

risk.desc: The cable entry design may not provide sufficient strain relief for the cable harness
risk.mit: Add strain relief features to the cable entry design

risk.desc: The leveling screws may not provide adequate adjustment range for precise alignment
risk.mit: Increase the adjustment range of the leveling screws

risk.desc: The internal channel may not provide sufficient clearance for the cable harness
risk.mit: Increase the size of the internal channel to accommodate the cable harness

_subsystem_plan.subsystem_role: Base rotary joint J1, +-180deg, harmonic drive, 100Nm peak torque, mounting flange ISO 9409

physics_paths.path: Base plate -> Mounting flange -> Harmonic drive -> Arm structure
Base plate -> Mounting flange -> Harmonic drive -> Arm motion
Base plate -> Mounting flange -> Harmonic drive -> Heat dissipation
Base plate -> Cable entry -> Service access

integration_opportunities: Base plate can be integrated with a leveling system for precise alignment
Cable entry can be sealed with ESD-safe materials for cleanroom use
Harmonic drive can be pre-assembled for quicker installation

requirements: Shoulder pitch joint J2, +-120deg, harmonic drive, 80Nm, cable routing through center bore
Vehicle context: 6-DOF serial industrial robot arm, 5kg payload, 600mm reach
Application variant: cleanroom semiconductor handling, ESD-safe, particle-free joint seals
Suggested material: Al 7075 + steel + composite, process: CNC + LPBF

verify.rule: Ensure all required evidence features are present.
Ensure the mass estimate is within the design constraints.
Ensure P0 internal_feature_targets are traceable to geometry_ops.
Ensure interfaces are reciprocal with neighboring subsystems.
Ensure critical joints have visible locking/preload evidence.
Ensure boundary conditions are specified for downstream CFD/FEA.

risk.desc: Potential for thermal expansion mismatch between aluminum and steel components.
risk.mit: Use thermal expansion coefficients to design joint clearances.

risk.desc: Risk of cable damage due to repeated flexing over joint travel range.
risk.mit: Implement strain relief and slack loops in harness routing.

risk.desc: Risk of joint misalignment during assembly due to tolerance stack-up.
risk.mit: Use precision datum faces and align pins for assembly.

risk.desc: Risk of ESD damage to sensitive semiconductor components.
risk.mit: Implement ESD-safe materials and handling procedures.

risk.desc: Risk of particle contamination due to inadequate sealing.
risk.mit: Use particle-free seals and cleanroom-compatible materials.

verify.value: All required features are present in part_tree/geometry_ops.
verify.rule: required evidence_features (each must appear in part_tree/geometry_ops)

verify.value: Mass estimate is provided and plausible.
verify.rule: cad_brief.mass_est_g must be a numeric grams value

verify.value: All P0 internal_feature_targets are mapped to part_tree children and geometry_ops.
verify.rule: P0 internal_feature_targets appear as part_tree children and geometry_ops ids or targets

verify.value: Interfaces are named with exact neighboring subsystem labels and connection_type, DOF, clearance_mm, and required_feature are specified.
verify.rule: name exact neighboring subsystem labels when they mate, and choose connection_type + DOF + clearance_mm + required_feature so the neighbor can declare the same joint family back

verify.value: Critical joints state locking method and torque/preload intent.
verify.rule: Critical joints state locking method (locknut, insert, washer, adhesive note) and torque/preload intent

verify.value: Boundary_conditions object includes fixture_points, thermal_zones, and pressure_faces.
verify.rule: verify must include a boundary_conditions object: fixture_points [{at:[x,y,z], type:fixed|pinned|roller}], thermal_zones [{at:[x,y,z], W_or_degC:number, role:source|sink}], pressure_faces [{face:string, Pa:number}]

risk.desc: Potential for thermal expansion mismatch between Al 7075 and steel fasteners.
risk.mit: Use thermal expansion coefficients to predict and mitigate potential mismatches.

risk.desc: Risk of cable conduit blockage due to improper routing.
risk.mit: Ensure cable harness has slack loops and strain relief at both ends.

risk.desc: Risk of insufficient structural integrity if wall thickness is not properly calculated.
risk.mit: Calculate wall thickness based on load requirements and material properties.

risk.desc: Risk of misalignment during assembly if datum references are not clearly defined.
risk.mit: Define primary datum features explicitly and include them in assembly_sequence.

risk.desc: Risk of ESD damage if ESD-safe materials and procedures are not followed.
risk.mit: Ensure all materials and procedures comply with ESD-safe standards.
